article_title: Anthropic Rents All of SpaceX's Colossus 1 in Memphis, Adding 300 MW and 220,000 Nvidia GPUs to Cope With 80-Fold Quarterly Growth
summary: Duplicate of already-published article on the Anthropic/SpaceX Colossus 1 deal (PR #1192, merged earlier in this batch). The work is discarded under v3.9.0; not eligible for rewrite.

findings.details: Already-published article: src/content/articles/2026-05/08-anthropic-leases-the-full-capacity-of-spacexs-colossus-1-data-center-adding-300-mw-and-over-220000-nvidia-gpus-to-the-claude-backend.md (originally PR #1192). Same Anthropic/SpaceX deal, same Colossus 1 / Memphis facility, same 300 MW / 220,000 GPU figures, same May 6 2026 announcement.

findings.message: Source redirected to different domain: consent.yahoo.com

content_preview.title: Anthropic Rents All of SpaceX's Colossus 1 in Memphis, Adding 300 MW and 220,000 Nvidia GPUs to Cope With 80-Fold Quarterly Growth
content_preview.summary: On May 6, Anthropic struck a deal to take over all compute capacity at SpaceX's Colossus 1 data center, enabling doubled Claude Code rate limits and an Opus API uplift to absorb a Q1 surge CEO Dario Amodei called 'just crazy.'
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Anthropic announced on May 6 that it has signed a deal with SpaceX to use the entire compute capacity of the Colossus 1 data center in Memphis, Tennessee, gaining more than 300 megawatts of new capacity and over 220,000 Nvidia GPUs within the month, [according to Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/higher-limits-spacex). The arrangement, announced alongside the company's developer day, hands a former rival's flagship supercomputer to Anthropic at a moment when CEO Dario Amodei...

recommendations: Before merging, the human reviewer should write a corrections file at src/content/corrections/<YYYY-MM>/<article-slug>.json documenting the warning(s).
Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt

editor_notes.content_quality: Substantively well-written with a fresh '80-fold quarterly growth' angle and a six-source set including Anthropic + Capacity + Al Jazeera + Yahoo + Engadget + Fortune. On its own merits would have been APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS for the capacityglobal.com allowlist gap.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Same 300 MW / 220,000 GPU / Colossus 1 deal as the already-published article.
editor_notes.originality: DUPLICATE of src/content/articles/2026-05/08-anthropic-leases-the-full-capacity-of-spacexs-colossus-1-data-center-adding-300-mw-and-over-220000-nvidia-gpus-to-the-claude-backend.md (PR #1192). This is the third submission this batch on the same Anthropic/Colossus disclosure (PRs #1192, #1197, #1199).
concerns: Direct duplicate of already-published article. Originality is decisive; the allowlist warning becomes moot.
Triple-collision: PRs #1192, #1197, and this one all attempted to cover the same disclosure. Bot operations needs stronger collision detection.
recommendations: Bot operations: parallel write-article agents need topic-collision detection that includes in-flight submissions, with a hard pre-check at the moment of branch creation.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: REJECT under v3.9.0. PR #1192 covers this disclosure.
